name: io.github.IvanMurzak/GameDev-MCP-Server
description: Make games with AI. Engine-agnostic MCP server shared by the Unity-MCP, Godot-MCP and Unreal-MCP editor plugins.

environment_variables.name: MCP_PLUGIN_CLIENT_TRANSPORT
environment_variables.description: Client -> Server transport type: stdio or streamableHttp (default: stdio)

environment_variables.name: MCP_AUTH
environment_variables.description: Authentication mode: none or oauth. Default depends on transport: stdio -> none (offline/local/CI), streamableHttp -> oauth when MCP_AUTH_ISSUER + MCP_PUBLIC_URL are set, otherwise none. oauth validates ES256 JWTs (via cached JWKS) issued by MCP_AUTH_ISSUER, audienced to MCP_PUBLIC_URL.

environment_variables.name: MCP_AUTH_ISSUER
environment_variables.description: OAuth authorization-server URL (e.g. https://ai-game.dev). Required when MCP_AUTH=oauth.

environment_variables.name: MCP_PUBLIC_URL
environment_variables.description: This server's canonical public resource URL (its token audience, e.g. https://ai-game.dev/mcp). Required when MCP_AUTH=oauth; also seeds the Origin allow-list.

environment_variables.name: MCP_BIND
environment_variables.description: Network bind address: loopback (default), any (0.0.0.0), or a specific IP. Hosted deploys reachable by a reverse proxy set MCP_BIND=0.0.0.0.

environment_variables.name: MCP_ALLOWED_ORIGINS
environment_variables.description: Comma/semicolon-separated additional allowed Origins for browser clients (in addition to loopback + the MCP_PUBLIC_URL origin). Avoids a blanket wildcard on credentialed paths.
